evals.prompt: Set up styling for a new Next.js project. We use Tailwind CSS and need a utility for combining classes.
evals.expected_output: Install clsx and tailwind-merge. Create lib/utils.ts: export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) { return twMerge(clsx(inputs)); }. Use cn() for all dynamic class combinations. Configure Tailwind in tailwind.config.ts with content paths. Use next/font for zero-CLS font loading.

evals.prompt: I want to use MUI (Material UI) in my Next.js App Router project.
evals.expected_output: MUI is a runtime CSS-in-JS library that forces 'use client' widely, degrading RSC performance. For App Router: wrap MUI components in Client Component wrappers. Better alternative: use Tailwind/shadcn (zero-runtime, RSC compatible). If MUI is required, create a ThemeRegistry client wrapper to isolate the runtime CSS injection.

evals.prompt: My image component doesn't have width and height attributes and the layout shifts during loading.
evals.expected_output: CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) violation. Fix with next/image — always specify width and height or use fill prop. Target CLS < 0.1. Example: or . Never use raw tags.

should_not_trigger: Write a Go middleware for request logging
Set up a PostgreSQL connection pool
Configure Jest for a Node.js backend
